description_en: A set of rooms forming an individual residence, typically on one floor and within a larger building.
example: They live in a modern two-bedroom apartment in the city center.
note: Commonly called a flat in the UK.

description_en: A platform enclosed by a wall or railing on the outside of a building.
example: We like to sit on the balcony and enjoy the sunset.

description_en: A low house having only one story or, in some cases, upper rooms set in the roof.
example: They moved to a small bungalow after they retired.

meaning: nhà tranh; nhà nhỏ ở vùng quê
description_en: A small simple house, typically one near a lake or beach.
example: We rented a cozy cottage in the mountains for our summer vacation.
note: Often associated with a rural or holiday setting.

description_en: A house, apartment, or other place of residence.
example: The area is mostly residential with many single-family dwellings.

description_en: All the money and property owned by a particular person, especially at death.
example: The family lives on a large country estate with several hectares of land.
note: Can refer to a collection of buildings or a large piece of land.

description_en: A device by which a flow of liquid or gas from a pipe or container can be controlled.
example: The kitchen faucet is leaking and needs to be fixed.

description_en: A building or shed for housing a motor vehicle or vehicles.
example: The house has a double garage for two cars.

description_en: An interior passage in a building.
example: The hallway was decorated with family photos and paintings.
note: Connects different rooms in a house.

description_en: Material used to insulate something, especially a building.
example: Good attic insulation helps keep the house warm in winter and cool in summer.

description_en: A length of timber or steel supporting part of the structure of a building.
example: The floor joists were replaced during the renovation process.
note: Structural support for floors and ceilings.

description_en: A small kitchen or part of a room equipped as a kitchen.
example: The studio apartment features a modern and functional kitchenette.

description_en: A person, especially a man, who rents out land, a building, or accommodation.
example: We need to contact the landlord about the broken window.
note: Property owner in a rental agreement.

description_en: A large, impressive house.
example: The movie star lives in a luxury mansion overlooking the ocean.

meaning: khu vực lân cận; xóm giềng
description_en: A district, especially one forming a community within a town or city.
example: This is a quiet and friendly neighborhood for families.

meaning: sự cư ngụ; tỷ lệ lấp đầy
description_en: The action or fact of occupying a place.
example: The hotel has a high occupancy rate during the peak season.
note: State of living in a place.

description_en: A small room or closet in which food, dishes, and utensils are kept.
example: The pantry is stocked with enough food for several weeks.

description_en: Rooms or lodgings, especially those allocated to people in military or domestic service.
example: The staff quarters are located in a separate building.

description_en: A person's home; the place where someone lives.
example: The Prime Minister's official residence is 10 Downing Street.

description_en: A window set in a roof or ceiling at the same angle.
example: The skylight provides plenty of natural light for the attic room.

description_en: A person who occupies land or property rented from a landlord.
example: The previous tenant moved out at the end of last month.

meaning: các dịch vụ tiện ích (điện, nước...)
description_en: A public utility such as a regular supply of water, electricity, or gas.
example: The monthly rent does not include utilities like heating and water.

description_en: A roofed platform along the outside of a house, level with the ground floor.
example: They spent the afternoon relaxing on the veranda with a cold drink.

description_en: Paper used for decoration on the interior walls of rooms.
example: They chose a floral wallpaper for the spare bedroom.

description_en: A system of two diagonal braces intersecting at their centers.
example: X-bracing is used to reinforce the structure of the house in earthquake zones.

description_en: An area of ground surrounding a building.
example: The children love to play in the big back yard.

description_en: An area having a particular characteristic, use, or subject to particular restrictions.
example: The house is located in a quiet residential zone.
note: Specific area within a city or building.

description_en: A desirable or useful feature or facility of a building or place.
example: Modern apartments offer many amenities like a pool and a gym.

description_en: The floor of a building which is partly or entirely below ground level.
example: We use the basement for storage and as a laundry room.

meaning: căn hộ chung cư cao cấp
description_en: A building or complex of buildings containing a number of individually owned apartments or houses.
example: He recently purchased a luxury condominium in downtown Chicago.

description_en: A large bedroom for a number of people in a school or institution.
example: He lives in a university dormitory with three other students.

description_en: The part of a roof that meets or overhangs the walls of a building.
example: Birds often build their nests under the eaves of the house.

description_en: The lowest load-bearing part of a building, typically below ground level.
example: Before building the walls, the foundation needs to be solid.

description_en: A shallow trough fixed beneath the edge of a roof for carrying off rainwater.
example: We need to clear the leaves out of the gutters before the rainy season.

description_en: The floor of a fireplace.
example: A large stone hearth was the central feature of the living room.
note: Traditionally the heart of the home.

description_en: The action of insulating something or the state of being insulated.
example: Effective sound insulation is important in a busy apartment building.

description_en: A room or area where food is prepared and cooked.
example: The family often gathers in the kitchen for breakfast.

description_en: An area of short, regularly mown grass in the garden of a house or park.
example: He spends his Saturday mornings mowing the front lawn.

description_en: A legal agreement by which a bank or other creditor lends money at interest in exchange for taking title of the debtor's property.
example: The bank approved their application for a 30-year mortgage.

description_en: A room in a house for the special use of young children.
example: They painted the walls of the nursery a soft blue color.
note: Specifically for babies or young kids.

description_en: Serving or intended as an ornament; decorative.
example: The garden features several ornamental statues and fountains.
note: For aesthetic rather than practical use.

description_en: A covered shelter projecting in front of the entrance of a building.
example: They sat on the front porch and watched the neighbors go by.

meaning: cổ kính; kỳ lạ một cách thú vị
description_en: Attractively unusual or old-fashioned.
example: They stayed in a quaint little cottage in a remote village.
note: Often used for charming old buildings.

description_en: A device for heating a room.
example: Don't put curtains over the radiator as it will block the heat.
note: Heats the interior of a house.

description_en: A rectangular tile, typically made of wood, that is laid in overlapping rows to cover the roofs or walls of buildings.
example: The storm blew several shingles off the roof.

description_en: A strip of wood, metal, or stone forming the bottom of a doorway and crossed in entering a house or room.
example: He stepped across the threshold and entered the dark house.

description_en: Soft, padded textile covering that is fixed to furniture such as armchairs and sofas.
example: They decided to change the upholstery on their old dining chairs.

description_en: The provision of fresh air to a room or building.
example: Good ventilation is important in a bathroom to prevent mold.

description_en: A pane of glass in a window.
example: Raindrops streaked down the windowpane during the storm.
note: Individual glass part of a window.

description_en: Amount of money produced by an investment.
example: The rental yield on this apartment is about 5% per year.
